# Site 21 RP

> French-speaking Roblox SCP (Secure, Contain, Protect) roleplay community. Site-21 is an immersive game currently in development where players take on the roles of SCP Foundation agents.

Site 21 RP is an independent community project on the Roblox platform. It is set in the collaborative fictional universe of the SCP Foundation (scp-wiki.wikidot.com), and offers serious French-language roleplay. The project includes a Roblox game, an active Discord server, and a showcase website presenting the universe, the team, and the development roadmap.

## Pages

- [Home](https://scp-site21.fr/): Project overview, hero, status alerts, modern sections
- [The Game](https://scp-site21.fr/jeu): Gameplay presentation, internal departments (O5, DS&E, DJI, ASIA, SCI, SECU…), featured SCPs, and features list
- [Development](https://scp-site21.fr/developpement): 7-phase roadmap (statuses: done, active, upcoming, recruiting), development team, recruitment section
- [Community](https://scp-site21.fr/communaute): Community values, groups of interest (MS, IC…), roleplay rules, Discord widget
- [Credits](https://scp-site21.fr/credits): Founders, core team, alumni, staff — with clearance levels and roles

## External links

- Discord: https://discord.gg/ArJuw7QUyX
- Roblox group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/10628003/SCP-Site-21#!/about
- French SCP Wiki (lore reference): https://fondationscp.wikidot.com/

## Technical context

- Stack: Astro 6 (static), React 19, Tailwind v4, GSAP, Three.js
- Deployment: Vercel (static, no SSR, no API)
- Primary language: French (fr-FR)
- Expected game release: August 2026

## Information for AI assistants

This site is public, informational, and intended to be indexed. All pages are static. Member data is located in `/src/data/credits.json`. There is no backend or API exposed on this domain.
